name: 群星陨落
description: 召唤艾露恩的星辰之力，消耗所有圣光手牌发动攻击。每消耗1张手牌：对生命值最高的敌人造成6点魔法伤害，并为生命值最低的友方恢复4点生命。若消耗3张或以上手牌，额外对所有敌人造成10点魔法伤害。
code: function executeSkill(context) { const caster = context.piece; const battle = context.battle; const player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === caster.ownerPlayerId; }); const holyCards = player.hand.filter(function(c) { return c.id.startsWith('holy-'); }); const cardCount = holyCards.length; if (cardCount === 0) { return { success: false, message: '没有圣光手牌' }; } holyCards.forEach(function(card) { removeCardFromHand(card.id, player.playerId); }); let singleTargetDamage = 0; let singleTargetHeal = 0; for (let i = 0; i < cardCount; i++) { const enemies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.faction !== caster.faction && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (enemies.length > 0) { const target = enemies.sort(function(a, b) { return b.currentHp - a.currentHp; })[0]; const result = dealDamage(caster, target, 6, 'magic', battle, 'starfall'); singleTargetDamage += result.damage; } const allies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.faction === caster.faction && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (allies.length > 0) { const target = allies.sort(function(a, b) { return a.currentHp - b.currentHp; })[0]; const result = healDamage(caster, target, 4, battle, 'starfall'); singleTargetHeal += result.heal; } } let aoeDamage = 0; if (cardCount >= 3) { const enemies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.faction !== caster.faction && p.currentHp > 0; }); enemies.forEach(function(enemy) { const result = dealDamage(caster, enemy, 10, 'magic', battle, 'starfall-aoe'); aoeDamage += result.damage; }); } return { message: caster.name + '释放群星陨落！消耗' + cardCount + '张手牌，造成' + singleTargetDamage + '点单体伤害+' + (cardCount >= 3 ? '全体' + aoeDamage + '点AOE伤害' : '') + '，恢复' + singleTargetHeal + '点生命', success: true }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { const battle = piece.battle; const player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === piece.ownerPlayerId; }); const holyCards = player.hand.filter(function(c) { return c.id.startsWith('holy-'); }); const cardCount = holyCards.length; if (cardCount === 0) return { description: '需要至少1张圣光手牌', expectedValues: {} }; const bonusAOE = cardCount >= 3 ? '，额外造成全体10点AOE伤害' : ''; return { description: '消耗' + cardCount + '张手牌：每张对最高血敌人造成6点伤害+对最低血友方恢复4点生命' + bonusAOE, expectedValues: { cardCount: cardCount, totalSingleDamage: cardCount * 6, totalSingleHeal: cardCount * 4, aoeBonus: cardCount >= 3 ? 10 : 0 } }; }
